'''jafupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngapi|ngapi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngapi|ngapi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jafupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæfipith|jæfipith]] || [[word:jæfipij|jæfipij]] || [[word:jæfipish|jæfipish]] || [[word:jæfipi|jæfipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jafufuputh|jafufuputh]] || [[word:jafufupuj|jafufupuj]] || [[word:jafufupush|jafufupush]] || [[word:jafufupu|jafufupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jafuputh|jafuputh]] || [[word:jafupuj|jafupuj]] || [[word:jafupush|jafupush]] || [[word:jafupu|jafupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jafufputh|jafufputh]] || [[word:jafufpuj|jafufpuj]] || [[word:jafufpush|jafufpush]] || [[word:jafufpuf|jafufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jafuputhu|jafuputhu]] || [[word:jafupuju|jafupuju]] || [[word:jafupushu|jafupushu]] || [[word:jafupuku|jafupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jafuputh|jafuputh]] || [[word:jafupuj|jafupuj]] || [[word:jafupush|jafupush]] || [[word:jafupu|jafupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jafuputhul|jafuputhul]] || [[word:jafupujul|jafupujul]] || [[word:jafupushul|jafupushul]] || [[word:jafupukul|jafupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jafuputhuthu|jafuputhuthu]] || [[word:jafupujuju|jafupujuju]] || [[word:jafupushushu|jafupushushu]] || [[word:jafupuku|jafupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jafuputhun|jafuputhun]] || [[word:jafupujun|jafupujun]] || [[word:jafupushun|jafupushun]] || [[word:jafupukun|jafupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jafuputhuoro|jafuputhuoro]] || [[word:jafupujuoro|jafupujuoro]] || [[word:jafupushuoro|jafupushuoro]] || [[word:jafupukuoro|jafupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
